name: MikroTik
description: MikroTik (officially SIA "Mikrotīkls") is a Latvian networking equipment manufacturer founded in 1996 that specializes in high-performance, cost-effective routers, switches, and wireless systems. The company is widely recognized for its RouterOS software, which provides advanced enterprise-level features—such as BGP, OSPF, MPLS, and complex firewalls—at a fraction of the cost of traditional enterprise vendors.
